## Summary

Describe the rule, schema, source, profile, or pack change.

## Change class

- [ ] Editorial
- [ ] Schema
- [ ] Industry rule
- [ ] Ruslan Magana Definition
- [ ] MatrixHub policy
- [ ] Critical validation rule
- [ ] Release/update process

## Checklist

- [ ] Rule IDs are unique.
- [ ] Schemas validate.
- [ ] Source references are declared.
- [ ] Critical rules have validation behavior.
- [ ] Exceptions have expiry.
- [ ] Pack builds successfully.
- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] Docs updated.

## Risk

Explain risk and rollback plan.
